task_completion.description: Locate the target conversation in the helpdesk inbox or search results.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The inbox list or search results display a conversation from 'Sarah Jones' with a subject containing 'Suspicious invoice'.

task_completion.description: Open the specific conversation from Sarah Jones.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main view displays the opened conversation thread, clearly showing the customer name 'Sarah Jones' and the subject 'Suspicious invoice attached - urgent check needed'.

task_completion.description: Apply the 'Security Alert' tag to the conversation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A tag labeled 'Security Alert' is visible in the tags section (typically in the right sidebar) of the opened conversation.

task_completion.description: Assign the conversation to the Administrator.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The assignee field (typically in the right sidebar) shows 'Administrator' or the email 'admin@helpdesk.local' as the assigned user.

task_completion.description: Add an internal note with the required escalation text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An internal note (usually appearing as a distinct, colored block like yellow in FreeScout) is posted in the conversation thread containing the text 'Escalated for immediate header analysis.'

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web browser GUI to interact with the helpdesk.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the FreeScout web interface, not a terminal window executing SQL queries or curl commands.

integrity.description: Verify the internal note was actually submitted in the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The internal note appears as a submitted message block within the conversation thread history, not just text typed into an unsent draft box or an external text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the agent modified the correct conversation and not a distractor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The tag, assignment, and note are applied specifically to the conversation from 'Sarah Jones' about the 'Suspicious invoice', and not to any other customer's ticket.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Customer: Sarah Jones (sarah.jones@marketing-partner.net). Target Subject: 'Suspicious invoice attached - urgent check needed'. Required Tag: 'Security Alert'. Required Assignee: Administrator (admin@helpdesk.local). Required Note Content: 'Escalated for immediate header analysis.' (must contain 'header analysis'). The application is FreeScout, where internal notes typically appear as distinct (often yellow) message blocks in the conversation thread.
